channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-15444] replay-single test_70c: LBUG in llog_osd_write_rec
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Sergey Cheremencev <c17829@cray.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/4c5e6853-2810-4c69-9f4d-c72f10926980

test_70c failed with the following error:

trevis-80vm5 crashed during replay-single test_70c

[ 5302.103380] LustreError: 101735:0:(llog_osd.c:626:llog_osd_write_rec()) lustre-MDT0000-osp-MDT0001: index 200 already set in llog bitmap [0x200000401:0x2:0x0]
[ 5302.106140] LustreError: 101735:0:(llog_osd.c:628:llog_osd_write_rec()) LBUG
[ 5302.107437] Pid: 101735, comm: mdt00_004 4.18.0-240.22.1.el8_lustre.x86_64 #1 SMP Tue Dec 14 00:02:22 UTC 2021
[ 5302.109256] Call Trace TBD:
[ 5302.110070] [<0>] libcfs_call_trace+0x6f/0x90 [libcfs]
[ 5302.111028] [<0>] lbug_with_loc+0x43/0x80 [libcfs]
[ 5302.112186] [<0>] llog_osd_write_rec+0x1ad9/0x1ae0 [obdclass]
[ 5302.113269] [<0>] llog_write_rec+0x3f6/0x530 [obdclass]
[ 5302.114263] [<0>] llog_cat_add_rec+0x130/0x930 [obdclass]
[ 5302.115278] [<0>] llog_add+0x195/0x1e0 [obdclass]
[ 5302.116661] [<0>] sub_updates_write+0x218/0x1320 [ptlrpc]
[ 5302.117727] [<0>] top_trans_stop+0x34e/0x1190 [ptlrpc]
[ 5302.118792] [<0>] lod_trans_stop+0x9f/0x360 [lod]
[ 5302.119755] [<0>] mdd_trans_stop+0x29/0x17f [mdd]
[ 5302.120799] [<0>] mdt_reint_setattr+0xd15/0x1610 [mdt]
[ 5302.121768] [<0>] mdt_reint_rec+0x117/0x270 [mdt]
[ 5302.122664] [<0>] mdt_reint_internal+0x4bc/0x7d0 [mdt]
[ 5302.123631] [<0>] mdt_reint+0x5d/0x110 [mdt]
[ 5302.124461] [<0>] tgt_request_handle+0xc93/0x1a00 [ptlrpc]
[ 5302.125510] [<0>] ptlrpc_server_handle_request+0x323/0xbd0 [ptlrpc]
[ 5302.126702] [<0>] ptlrpc_main+0xc06/0x1550 [ptlrpc]
[ 5302.127647] [<0>] kthread+0x112/0x130
[ 5302.128341] [<0>] ret_from_fork+0x35/0x40
[ 5302.129094] Kernel panic - not syncing: LBUG

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
replay-single test_70c - trevis-80vm5 crashed during replay-single test_70c

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
"Alexander Boyko <alexander.boyko@hpe.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/59614
Subject: LU-15444 out: drop update with wrong llog_hdr->lrh_tail
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: ae443c28dbd082ac9df8d7789c03f89758b01b47

Together with updating a header tail record, osp writes a bitmap. Since records belong to the same u32 word, the latest update will zero out the previous bits. And this creates a situation where first records would be lost during processing.

When Lustre is affected by this race, the remote MDT may have incorrect bitmap data and the procedure for recovering a cross-MDT operations may yield incorrect results.

This is a big problem for DNE2 when recovery is needed, and I don't know how to fix it.

adilger could you please take a look on this?

The provided patch catch the error early on a remote MDT

Crash (id 73146 seen 0) in racer@ldiskfs+DNE

Failed run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/gerrit-janitor/51219/testresults/racer-ldiskfs-DNE-centos7_x86_64-centos7_x86_64-retry1
View Change

1 comment:

File lustre/target/out_lib.c:

Patch Set #1, Line 696: LASSERTF(rc || __le32_to_cpu(buf[1]) >= tail.lrt_index,

Crash with latest lustre function out_tx_write_exec in backtrace called here:

 LustreError: 7220:0:(out_lib.c:699:out_tx_write_exec()) ASSERTION( rc || __le32_to_cpu(buf[1]) >= tail.lrt_index ) failed: wrong hdr tail [0x240000401:0x2:0x0] idx 1390->1389
LustreError: 7220:0:(out_lib.c:699:out_tx_write_exec()) LBUG
CPU: 1 PID: 7220 Comm: mdt_out00_000 Kdump: loaded Tainted: P           OE  ------------   3.10.0-7.9-debug #1
Hardware name: QEMU Standard PC (i440FX + PIIX, 1996), BIOS 1.16.3-2.fc40 04/01/2014
Call Trace:
 [<ffffffff817ded29>] dump_stack+0x19/0x1b
 [<ffffffffa0221b4d>] lbug_with_loc+0x4d/0xa0 [libcfs]
 [<ffffffffa08e4e2b>] out_tx_write_exec+0x2eb/0x570 [ptlrpc]
 [<ffffffffa08db29e>] out_tx_end+0xde/0x5f0 [ptlrpc]
 [<ffffffffa08deeb3>] out_handle+0x1c43/0x2450 [ptlrpc]
 [<ffffffffa08c067b>] ? tgt_free_reply_data+0xeb/0x2c0 [ptlrpc]
 [<ffffffffa07fd7f2>] ? lustre_msg_get_opc+0x22/0xf0 [ptlrpc]
 [<ffffffffa08d0714>] ? tgt_request_preprocess.isra.26+0xf4/0x850 [ptlrpc]
 [<ffffffffa08d15be>] tgt_request_handle+0x74e/0x1a60 [ptlrpc]
 [<ffffffffa080fd87>] ptlrpc_server_handle_request+0x257/0xcd0 [ptlrpc]
 [<ffffffffa0811b71>] ptlrpc_main+0xc61/0x1640 [ptlrpc]
 [<ffffffff810dbb51>] ? put_prev_entity+0x31/0x400
 [<ffffffff81410a79>] ? do_raw_spin_unlock+0x49/0x90
 [<ffffffff817e8dce>] ? _raw_spin_unlock_irq+0xe/0x30
 [<ffffffffa0810f10>] ? ptlrpc_wait_event+0x630/0x630 [ptlrpc]
 [<ffffffff810ba114>] kthread+0xe4/0xf0
 [<ffffffff810ba030>] ? kthread_create_on_node+0x140/0x140
 [<ffffffff817f3e5d>] ret_from_fork_nospec_begin+0x7/0x21
 [<ffffffff810ba030>] ? kthread_create_on_node+0x140/0x140

"Alexander Boyko <alexander.boyko@hpe.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/59036
Subject: LU-15444 tests: assertion for llog_hdr->lrh_tail
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 53925d84d3e91ed29f21e57a5f6c18e6d84f761a

This bug still exist at Lustre 2.16, and reproducible by racer.sh with a small chance.

[ 9053.931537] LustreError: 45756:0:(llog_osd.c:631:llog_osd_write_rec()) ASSERTION( !rc ) failed: testfs-MDT0001-osp-MDT0000: index 68480 already set in llog bitmap [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]
[ 9053.951037] LustreError: 45756:0:(llog_osd.c:631:llog_osd_write_rec()) LBUG
[ 9053.959289] CPU: 9 PID: 45756 Comm: mdt00_025 Kdump: loaded Tainted: G S         OE    --------  ---  5.14.0-284.18.1.x7.0.010.13.x86_64 #1
[ 9053.974295] Hardware name: Seagate Laguna Seca/Laguna Seca, BIOS v02.0043 09/24/2019
[ 9053.983113] Call Trace:
[ 9053.986618]  <TASK>
[ 9053.989762]  dump_stack_lvl+0x34/0x48
[ 9053.994468]  lbug_with_loc.cold+0x5/0x58 [libcfs]
[ 9054.000201]  llog_osd_write_rec+0x1825/0x1c50 [obdclass]
[ 9054.006574]  llog_write_rec+0x43c/0x590 [obdclass]
[ 9054.012380]  llog_cat_add_rec+0xab/0x5a0 [obdclass]
[ 9054.018270]  llog_add+0x19e/0x200 [obdclass]
[ 9054.023531]  sub_updates_write+0x1cc/0x1380 [ptlrpc]
[ 9054.029538]  ? top_trans_stop+0x44f/0xd00 [ptlrpc]
[ 9054.035311]  top_trans_stop+0x44f/0xd00 [ptlrpc]
[ 9054.040990]  ? mdd_attr_set_internal+0x95/0x2d0 [mdd]
[ 9054.046969]  mdd_trans_stop+0x24/0x16c [mdd]
[ 9054.052107]  mdd_create+0x951/0x10b0 [mdd]
[ 9054.057071]  mdt_create+0xc10/0x19d0 [mdt]
[ 9054.062042]  mdt_reint_create+0x291/0x430 [mdt]
[ 9054.067419]  mdt_reint_rec+0x119/0x270 [mdt]
[ 9054.072566]  mdt_reint_internal+0x4e4/0x850 [mdt]
[ 9054.078068]  mdt_reint+0x59/0x110 [mdt]
[ 9054.082731]  tgt_handle_request0+0x147/0x770 [ptlrpc]
[ 9054.088657]  tgt_request_handle+0x1eb/0xb80 [ptlrpc]
[ 9054.094486]  ptlrpc_server_handle_request.isra.0+0x29d/0xce0 [ptlrpc]
[ 9054.101759]  ptlrpc_main+0xa7e/0xfa0 [ptlrpc]

 There is a conflict between osp update request versions and llog index behaviour.
The next is a log for a FID [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0].

00000040:00080000:15.0:1743720117.786976:0:46321:0:(llog_osd.c:749:llog_osd_write_rec()) added record [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0].68476, 424 off51390736
00000040:00001000:14.0:1743720117.786993:0:45780:0:(llog_osd.c:412:llog_osd_write_rec()) new record 106a0000 to [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]
00000040:00080000:14.0:1743720117.786997:0:45780:0:(llog_osd.c:749:llog_osd_write_rec()) added record [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0].68477, 424 off51391160
00000040:00001000:4.0:1743720117.787010:0:46262:0:(llog_osd.c:412:llog_osd_write_rec()) new record 106a0000 to [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]
00000040:00080000:4.0:1743720117.787015:0:46262:0:(llog_osd.c:749:llog_osd_write_rec()) added record [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0].68478, 1048 off51392208
00000040:00001000:15.0:1743720117.787017:0:97347:0:(llog_osd.c:412:llog_osd_write_rec()) new record 106a0000 to [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]
00000040:00080000:15.0:1743720117.787021:0:97347:0:(llog_osd.c:749:llog_osd_write_rec()) added record [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0].68479, 424 off51392632
00000040:00001000:11.0:1743720117.787078:0:30371:0:(llog_osd.c:412:llog_osd_write_rec()) new record 106a0000 to [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]

00000040:00080000:7.0:1743720117.787209:0:46375:0:(llog_osd.c:749:llog_osd_write_rec()) added record [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0].68482, 2232 off51397032
00000004:00080000:3.0:1743720117.787608:0:30386:0:(osp_md_object.c:1164:osp_write_interpreter()) error [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]: rc = -116
00000004:00080000:3.0:1743720117.787610:0:30386:0:(osp_md_object.c:1164:osp_write_interpreter()) error [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]: rc = -116
00000004:00080000:3.0:1743720117.787611:0:30386:0:(osp_md_object.c:1164:osp_write_interpreter()) error [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]: rc = -116

00000004:00080000:3.0:1743720117.787630:0:30386:0:(osp_md_object.c:1164:osp_write_interpreter()) error [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]: rc = -5
00000004:00080000:3.0:1743720117.787631:0:30386:0:(osp_md_object.c:1164:osp_write_interpreter()) error [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]: rc = -5
00000004:00080000:3.0:1743720117.787632:0:30386:0:(osp_md_object.c:1164:osp_write_interpreter()) error [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]: rc = -5
00000004:00080000:3.0:1743720117.787634:0:30386:0:(osp_md_object.c:1164:osp_write_interpreter()) error [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]: rc = -5

00000004:00080000:3.0:1743720117.787636:0:30386:0:(osp_md_object.c:1164:osp_write_interpreter()) error [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]: rc = -5
00000004:00080000:3.0:1743720117.787637:0:30386:0:(osp_md_object.c:1164:osp_write_interpreter()) error [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]: rc = -5
00000004:00080000:3.0:1743720117.787639:0:30386:0:(osp_md_object.c:1164:osp_write_interpreter()) error [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]: rc = -5
00000004:00080000:3.0:1743720117.787640:0:30386:0:(osp_md_object.c:1164:osp_write_interpreter()) error [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]: rc = -5
00000004:00080000:3.0:1743720117.787641:0:30386:0:(osp_md_object.c:1164:osp_write_interpreter()) error [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]: rc = -5
00000004:00080000:3.0:1743720117.787642:0:30386:0:(osp_md_object.c:1164:osp_write_interpreter()) error [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]: rc = -5
00000004:00080000:5.0:1743720117.793892:0:46366:0:(osp_object.c:645:osp_attr_get()) testfs-MDT0001-osp-MDT0000: validate object [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]
00000040:00001000:5.0:1743720117.794202:0:46366:0:(llog_osd.c:297:llog_osd_read_header()) testfs-MDT0001-osp-MDT0000: llog [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0] lgh_last_idx = 68477, 0x3fff0000 :rc = 32768
00000040:00001000:4.0:1743720117.795127:0:46390:0:(llog_osd.c:412:llog_osd_write_rec()) new record 106a0000 to [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]
00000040:00080000:4.0:1743720117.795131:0:46390:0:(llog_osd.c:749:llog_osd_write_rec()) added record [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0].68478, 496 off51394136
00000040:00001000:10.0:1743720117.800852:0:30467:0:(llog.c:235:llog_cancel_arr_rec()) Canceling 1 records, first 68464 in log [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]
00000040:00001000:10.0:1743720117.800860:0:30467:0:(llog_osd.c:412:llog_osd_write_rec()) new record 10645539 to [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]
00000020:00080000:10.0:1743720117.800864:0:30467:0:(update_trans.c:1296:distribute_txn_cancel_records()) testfs-MDT0001-osp-MDT0000: batchid 1636391575366 cancel update log [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0].68464: rc = 0
00000040:00001000:10.0:1743720117.800882:0:30467:0:(llog.c:235:llog_cancel_arr_rec()) Canceling 1 records, first 68465 in log [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]
00000040:00001000:10.0:1743720117.800885:0:30467:0:(llog_osd.c:412:llog_osd_write_rec()) new record 10645539 to [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]
00000020:00080000:10.0:1743720117.800887:0:30467:0:(update_trans.c:1296:distribute_txn_cancel_records()) testfs-MDT0001-osp-MDT0000: batchid 1636391575367 cancel update log [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0].68465: rc = 0
00000040:00001000:10.0:1743720117.800894:0:30467:0:(llog.c:235:llog_cancel_arr_rec()) Canceling 1 records, first 68466 in log [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]
00000040:00001000:10.0:1743720117.800896:0:30467:0:(llog_osd.c:412:llog_osd_write_rec()) new record 10645539 to [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]
00000020:00080000:10.0:1743720117.800898:0:30467:0:(update_trans.c:1296:distribute_txn_cancel_records()) testfs-MDT0001-osp-MDT0000: batchid 1636391575368 cancel update log [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0].68466: rc = 0
00000040:00001000:10.0:1743720117.800905:0:30467:0:(llog.c:235:llog_cancel_arr_rec()) Canceling 1 records, first 68467 in log [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]
00000040:00001000:10.0:1743720117.800907:0:30467:0:(llog_osd.c:412:llog_osd_write_rec()) new record 10645539 to [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]
00000020:00080000:10.0:1743720117.800909:0:30467:0:(update_trans.c:1296:distribute_txn_cancel_records()) testfs-MDT0001-osp-MDT0000: batchid 1636391575369 cancel update log [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0].68467: rc = 0
00000040:00001000:10.0:1743720117.800915:0:30467:0:(llog.c:235:llog_cancel_arr_rec()) Canceling 1 records, first 68468 in log [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]
00000040:00001000:10.0:1743720117.800918:0:30467:0:(llog_osd.c:412:llog_osd_write_rec()) new record 10645539 to [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]
00000020:00080000:10.0:1743720117.800919:0:30467:0:(update_trans.c:1296:distribute_txn_cancel_records()) testfs-MDT0001-osp-MDT0000: batchid 1636391575370 cancel update log [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0].68468: rc = 0
00000040:00001000:10.0:1743720117.800926:0:30467:0:(llog.c:235:llog_cancel_arr_rec()) Canceling 1 records, first 68469 in log [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]
00000040:00001000:10.0:1743720117.800928:0:30467:0:(llog_osd.c:412:llog_osd_write_rec()) new record 10645539 to [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]
00000020:00080000:10.0:1743720117.800930:0:30467:0:(update_trans.c:1296:distribute_txn_cancel_records()) testfs-MDT0001-osp-MDT0000: batchid 1636391575371 cancel update log [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0].68469: rc = 0
00000040:00001000:6.0:1743720117.802793:0:45712:0:(llog_osd.c:412:llog_osd_write_rec()) new record 106a0000 to [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]
00000040:00080000:6.0:1743720117.802798:0:45712:0:(llog_osd.c:749:llog_osd_write_rec()) added record [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0].68479, 656 off51394792
00000040:00001000:9.0:1743720117.803058:0:45756:0:(llog_osd.c:412:llog_osd_write_rec()) new record 106a0000 to [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]
00000040:00040000:9.0:1743720117.803060:0:45756:0:(llog_osd.c:631:llog_osd_write_rec()) ASSERTION( !rc ) failed: testfs-MDT0001-osp-MDT0000: index 68480 already set in llog bitmap [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0]

The steps are valid, llog writes, error from MDT01, invalidate, llog refresh. Then a second llog_add() failed with a bitmap is set.

The next is llog adding with osp_update_request versions. 68480 record index has version 1542085, 68479 version 1542089, 68477 - 1542087. So at MDT01 operation would be executed base on version, it executes 1542085 and add 68480 index and record, then 1542086, 1542087, and at version 1542088 it fails with error, so llog would have incorrect state. The last index would be equal to last wrote record, but bitmap would have 68480 index set.

00000040:00080000:15.0:1743720117.786976:0:46321:0:(llog_osd.c:749:llog_osd_write_rec()) added record [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0].68476, 424 off51390736
00000004:00080000:15.0:1743720117.786978:0:46321:0:(osp_trans.c:1581:osp_trans_stop()) testfs-MDT0001-osp-MDT0000: add oth 000000002914fbf9 with version 1542086

00000040:00080000:14.0:1743720117.786997:0:45780:0:(llog_osd.c:749:llog_osd_write_rec()) added record [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0].68477, 424 off51391160
00000004:00080000:14.0:1743720117.787000:0:45780:0:(osp_trans.c:1581:osp_trans_stop()) testfs-MDT0001-osp-MDT0000: add oth 00000000bafb412b with version 1542087

00000040:00080000:4.0:1743720117.787015:0:46262:0:(llog_osd.c:749:llog_osd_write_rec()) added record [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0].68478, 1048 off51392208
00000004:00080000:4.0:1743720117.787017:0:46262:0:(osp_trans.c:1581:osp_trans_stop()) testfs-MDT0001-osp-MDT0000: add oth 0000000076d6ecee with version 1542088

00000040:00080000:15.0:1743720117.787021:0:97347:0:(llog_osd.c:749:llog_osd_write_rec()) added record [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0].68479, 424 off51392632
00000004:00080000:15.0:1743720117.787022:0:97347:0:(osp_trans.c:1581:osp_trans_stop()) testfs-MDT0001-osp-MDT0000: add oth 00000000e3cae33f with version 1542089

00000040:00080000:11.0:1743720117.787082:0:30371:0:(llog_osd.c:749:llog_osd_write_rec()) added record [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0].68480, 1008 off51393640
00000004:00080000:11.0:1743720117.787084:0:30371:0:(osp_trans.c:1581:osp_trans_stop()) testfs-MDT0001-osp-MDT0000: add oth 000000007d8da1e5 with version 1542085

000000040:00080000:5.0:1743720117.787089:0:45637:0:(llog_osd.c:749:llog_osd_write_rec()) added record [0x240008cbb:0xb3ce:0x0].68481, 1160 off51394800
00000004:00080000:5.0:1743720117.787091:0:45637:0:(osp_trans.c:1581:osp_trans_stop()) testfs-MDT0001-osp-MDT0000: add oth 000000000eb13906 with version 1542090

Looks like llog write for version 1542085 happened later than for older OUR, and together with EIO on MDT01 this created an inconsistent llog.
bzzz any thoughts?
